raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Open context","name":"Before we get into specifics, what's been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Safe opener that lets Test set the agenda and surface what feels most present.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Scope tradeoff","name":"What have you said no to this fortnight?","description":"Surfaces real prioritization choices and what got pushed out.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Attention drift","name":"Where is your attention getting pulled that isn't part of the main work?","description":"Looks for hidden context switching and low-value distractions.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision lag","name":"What decision are you waiting on that is slowing things down?","description":"Finds dependency risk and whether progress is being held up by external calls.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stakeholder signal","name":"How are your updates landing with the people who need them?","description":"Checks whether communication is creating confidence and movement, not just status.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Follow-up gap","name":"What tends to get lost after you share an update?","description":"Surfaces where communication breaks down after the initial message.","purpose":"competency","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Sustainable load","name":"What part of your load feels hardest to sustain right now?","description":"Probes whether the current pace is manageable without turning into a generic energy check.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Momentum source","name":"What part of the work is still pulling you in?","description":"Looks for genuine pull and ownership beyond the current priority list.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Focus friction","name":"What is making it hard to protect focus time?","description":"Surfaces the specific forces eroding deep work and control of the week.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Sharper next step","name":"What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?","description":"Closes by turning the conversation into concrete support and next-step adjustments.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
